query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(750002, 'What does "ecclesiology" specifically study?', 'multiple_choice', '["The doctrine of salvation","The doctrine of the church","The doctrine of humanity","The doctrine of Scripture"]', 'The doctrine of the church', 1),
(750002, 'The Greek term ekklēsia means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Temple","Assembly/church","Kingdom","Sacrifice"]', 'Assembly/church', 2),
(750002, 'In Matthew 16:18, Jesus promised to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Destroy the temple","Build His church","Abolish the law","Judge Israel"]', 'Build His church', 3),
(750002, 'Acts 2 describes:', 'multiple_choice', '["The fall of Jerusalem","The birth of the church at Pentecost","The end of the apostolic age","The destruction of the temple"]', 'The birth of the church at Pentecost', 4),
(750002, 'According to 1 Peter 2:9-10, the church is described as:', 'multiple_choice', '["A political organization","A chosen race and royal priesthood","A social club","A business enterprise"]', 'A chosen race and royal priesthood', 5),
(750002, 'The four classical marks of the church are:', 'multiple_choice', '["Large, wealthy, powerful, influential","One, holy, catholic, apostolic","Ancient, traditional, hierarchical, sacramental","Local, independent, democratic, voluntary"]', 'One, holy, catholic, apostolic', 6),
(750002, 'The Greek term koinōnia describes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Church hierarchy","Fellowship/shared life of believers","Worship rituals","Church buildings"]', 'Fellowship/shared life of believers', 7),
(750002, 'The three primary models of church governance are:', 'multiple_choice', '["Democratic, autocratic, theocratic","Episcopal, presbyterian, congregational","Monarchical, republican, federal","Hierarchical, egalitarian, charismatic"]', 'Episcopal, presbyterian, congregational', 8),
(750002, 'Baptism and the Lord''s Supper are recognized as:', 'multiple_choice', '["Optional practices","Dominical ordinances instituted by Christ","Medieval inventions","Cultural traditions"]', 'Dominical ordinances instituted by Christ', 9),
(750002, 'Why is ecclesiology essential for pastoral ministry?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is merely academic","It provides the framework for shepherding God''s flock","It focuses only on buildings","It has no practical application"]', 'It provides the framework for shepherding God''s flock', 10),
(750002, 'Discuss how the biblical images of the church as body, temple, and bride inform our understanding of church life and mission.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The body image emphasizes organic unity and diverse gifts, the temple image highlights the Spirit''s dwelling, and the bride image reveals Christ''s love and the church''s purity', 11);
